name: Zucchini Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 17x11-inch jelly-roll pan lightly.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, eggs, oil, cinnamon, vanilla, baking powder, baking soda, and salt with an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Gradually add flour to the mixture on low speed, mixing until just combined.
5. Stir in shredded zucchini and pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow the bars to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
Frosting:
1. Beat margarine, cream cheese, and vanilla together until smooth.
2. Gradually add confectioner's sugar on low speed, mixing until well blended.
3. Spread the frosting over the cooled cake and sprinkle with chopped walnuts.
4. Cut into bars.
